mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question_files WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND delflag = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question_files (question_id, original_filename, upload_filename, file_path, file_url, content_type, file_size, delflag, created_at) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{originalFilename}, #{uploadFilename}, #{filePath}, #{fileUrl}, #{contentType}, #{fileSize}, #{delflag}, #{createdAt})
